Thanks for the PR! A quick checklist before you open it.
-->

## What changed

<!-- A short description of the change. Link any related issues. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] New / updated third-party repo entry
- [ ] New / updated variant entry
- [ ] Infrastructure (workflow / script)

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the affected pages locally in both light and dark themes.
- [ ] Browser console is clean (no errors / warnings).
- [ ] If I changed `generate.js`, I re-ran the smoke test.
- [ ] For third-party entries: GPG fingerprint verified against the
      vendor's official docs; link to the docs is below.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if a page, workflow, or script was added,
      renamed, or removed.
